channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Four people arrested after fatal collision in Barnsley leads to murder investigation
item.description: South Yorkshire Police have arrested four individuals as part of a murder investigation following the death of a pedestrian in Barnsley. Emergency services responded to reports of a collision between ...

item.title: Challenges and Expectations Facing Nigeria's New Inspector-General of Police
item.description: Olatunji Disu don officially become Nigeria Police Force IGP after Kayode Egbetokun resign. President Bola Tinubu announce am say na critical time to tackle serious security wahala for country. Disu d...

item.title: Governor Alia Decries Killing of Nine in Benue Community Attack
item.description: Benue State Governor, Reverend Father Hyacinth Alia, don vex well-well over the fresh attack wey kill nine people for Mbalom-Mbatsada-Agana community inside Gwer-East Local Government Area. In him sta...

item.title: FG to settle N3.3tn legacy debts in electricity sector to improve supply
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu don approve N3.3 trillion payment plan to clear outstanding debts wey dey plague Nigeria power sector for over ten years. Dis plan na part of the Presidential Power Sector ...

item.title: Over 70 migrants feared dead following boat capsizing off Libya
item.description: A small vessel carrying more than 100 migrants capsized off the coast of Libya, leaving over 70 people feared dead. The boat, which had departed from the port of Tajoura, encountered turbulent seas sh...

item.title: How Lifestyle Choices Threaten Men’s Longevity in Tanzania
item.description: In this reflective column by Wa Muyanza, the writer shares a humorous yet sobering look at men’s drinking culture and how it affects their health and longevity. The story begins with a scene in a smal...

item.title: WNBA Expansion Draft Results: Key Picks for Portland and Toronto Teams
item.description: The WNBA held its expansion draft, allowing two new teams, the Portland Fire and Toronto Tempo, to select players to build their rosters. Portland, returning to the league after 24 years, selected vet...

item.title: Two students drown in Bataan beach; girl drowns in Negros Occidental river
item.description: Two students from Valenzuela City drowned while swimming at a beach in Barangay Poblacion, Morong, Bataan on Black Saturday. Police identified the victims as Christian, a 17-year-old Grade 12 student,...

item.title: Political Cartoons by Matt Wuerker Reflecting April 2026 Events
item.description: Politico’s April 2026 collection of political cartoons by Matt Wuerker offers sharp visual commentary on current events shaping American and global politics. Each illustration uses humor and exaggerat...

item.title: Iran declines U.S. ceasefire offer amid rising Middle East tensions
item.description: Iran don talk say no to America proposal wey dem send through back channels for 48-hour ceasefire inside the ongoing battle wey dey scatter the Middle East. Based on wetin Iranian media yarn, one thir...

item.title: Mpox detected in seven newborns in Khairpur; health authorities take urgent measures
item.description: Khairpur district in Sindh has reported its first local outbreak of mpox, a zoonotic viral infection, affecting newborns. Seven infants were admitted to public and private hospitals with symptoms rese...

item.title: FIR lodged over abduction, rape and murder of three-year-old girl in Lakki Marwat
item.description: Police in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa’s Lakki Marwat district have registered a first information report (FIR) following the shocking rape and murder of a three-year-old girl in the Langerkhel Hathi Khan local...

item.title: UConn and Michigan face off for national basketball championship
item.description: Connecticut (UConn) and Michigan are set to clash in a highly anticipated college basketball title game, with both teams carrying impressive legacies and high expectations. UConn aims to secure its th...

item.title: Mike Sonko Addresses Custody Dispute Over Baby James Amid Alleged Blackmail
item.description: Former Nairobi governor Mike Sonko has publicly revealed that he is facing blackmail from Baby James' family over the child’s custody. Sonko adopted Baby James following the tragic murder of the child...

item.title: FA Cup Semi-Finals Set as West Ham Edge Leeds after Extra Time
item.description: The FA Cup semi-final draw was confirmed following a dramatic quarter-final encounter between West Ham and Leeds United at the London Stadium. After an intense 120 minutes of football, the tie finishe...

item.title: Trump escalates threats over Hormuz as US‑Iran war intensifies
item.description: US president Donald Trump has issued a fresh ultimatum to Iran, demanding that the Strait of Hormuz be reopened by Tuesday night or face devastating attacks on power plants and bridges. The latest thr...

item.title: Iran executes two men linked to Israel amid anti-government protests
item.description: On April 5, 2026, Iran executed two men, Mohammad-Amin Biglari and Shahin Vahedparast, who were convicted of acting on behalf of Israel and the United States during anti-government protests earlier th...

item.title: Businessman revives Yorkshire theme park with ambitious plans
item.description: James Mellors, director of the Mellors Group, has purchased Lightwater Valley, a well-known theme park near Ripon in North Yorkshire. The park, which opened in 1969, once gained international fame for...

item.title: University of Waterloo student develops interactive map to help campus community avoid aggressive geese
item.description: A first-year computer science student at the University of Waterloo, Anirudh Dabas, has created an interactive web platform called Waddleloo to help students navigate campus while avoiding aggressive ...

item.title: Madhya Pradesh HC permits adult woman to live independently with partner of choice
item.description: In a significant judgment, the Madhya Pradesh High Court's Gwalior bench allowed a 19-year-old married woman to live independently with a man of her choosing. The court acted on a habeas corpus petiti...
